3135570.name: Combatant
3135570.description:
This game features a classic yet fresh take on the snake gameplay.
As more blocks are consumed, the snake's body grows longer.
The lyrical background music accompanies every move, creating a relaxed and enjoyable atmosphere. The goal is to extend the snake’s length as much as possible, but beware not to let its head touch its own body or the screen borders, as doing so ends the game. With its minimalist yet refined visuals and smooth controls, this game is an ideal choice for casual entertainment.
